name: enemy-variant-pack
description: Consistent enemy family recipe with silhouettes, roles, and palette continuity.

defaults.style: cohesive NES/SNES enemy pixel art, readable silhouette, simple animation-friendly anatomy, transparent background, no antialiasing
defaults.palette: clear blue, moss green, brick red, bone cream, dark navy outline

qa: Each enemy needs a distinct silhouette and gameplay read.
Avoid over-detail that will melt during animation.
Keep one shared palette accent so the family belongs together.

assets.prompt: Body: small walking enemy for {{brief}}, squat readable silhouette, one weak point, two short legs. Expression: goofy hostile. Pose: side view idle. Gameplay role: basic walker. Palette: {{palette}}. Style: {{style}}
Body: jumping enemy for {{brief}}, springy legs, round armored body, high readable arc pose. Expression: mischievous. Gameplay role: timed hopper. Palette: {{palette}}. Style: {{style}}

Body: small flying enemy for {{brief}}, bat-like armored silhouette, clear wings, no clutter. Expression: alert. Gameplay role: swooping flyer. Palette: {{palette}} with bright wing accent. Style: {{style}}

Body: shielded enemy for {{brief}}, larger front shield facing player, tiny feet visible, clear protected front and vulnerable back. Expression: stubborn. Gameplay role: block from front. Palette: {{palette}}. Style: {{style}}
